iran_nuke.notes: Day 17 03:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. IDF says 3+ more weeks of campaign ahead. 80% of Iran air defense destroyed could push nuclear hedging but no enrichment escalation yet. 26 (stable).

iran_conventional.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE). NEW: IDF tells CNN planning 'at least 3 more weeks' of Iran campaign — prolonged war signal (+5). Macron calls Pezeshkian demands 'immediate end' to Gulf attacks. 1,348 Iran civilian deaths confirmed at UN Security Council. No diplomatic track. 100 (capped, stable).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 90 (FALLING). Ceasefire talks expected 'in coming days' still dominant signal. Ground ops continue but diplomatic momentum building. Score drifts down 92→90 as talks advance without collapse. 90 (falling).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. No new Turkey-specific developments. Trump NATO Hormuz ultimatum further strains alliance cohesion. 72 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 78.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. No new India-specific developments. 25 (stable).

russia.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. EU extends Russia sanctions 6 months. No new Russia-ME developments. 71 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 77.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. Trump threatens to delay Xi summit over China Hormuz inaction. 90% of China oil transits Hormuz — major leverage point. 11 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. No new DPRK provocations. 12x 600mm MRL test (3rd provocation this week) still dominant signal. 55 (stable).

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 88 (RISING). 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday barrage confirmed. UK considering diverting interceptor drones to ME reducing Ukraine aid. Zaporizhzhia residential hit. Poland scrambled jets. 88 + 5 (Turkey coupling) = 93 (rising).

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 17 03:00 — IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE). NEW: Afghan mortar from across border kills 4 family members in Bajaur, Pakistan — civilian cross-border casualties escalating (+4). Pakistan Kandahar strikes continue overnight. Afghanistan claims captured border post, claims destroyed South Waziristan camp. 99 (capped, stable).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
MIXED SIGNALS (Day 17 03:00):
- ISRAEL-LEBANON: FALLING 92→90. Ceasefire talks remain on track 'in coming days.' First sustained de-escalation signal in 2+ weeks.
- IRAN: HARDENING. IDF plans 3+ more weeks campaign. FM rejects ceasefire. Trump rejects deal. No diplomatic track. All parties committed to continued fighting.
- PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN: STABLE at 99. Cross-border strikes continue. Afghan mortar kills Pakistan civilians — civilian toll rising on both sides. No ceasefire path.
- NET: One de-escalation channel (Lebanon) vs three hot fronts (Iran, Pak-Afghan, Ukraine) with no off-ramps. Global score stable 85.
changed_signals.synagogue_note: US domestic: Michigan synagogue attack suspect's brother confirmed by IDF as Hezbollah commander killed in Israeli strike. Domestic blowback from ME conflict.

latest_news.headline: IDF says planning 'at least 3 more weeks' of Iran campaign — 'thousands of targets' remain
latest_news.text: IDF tells CNN it is planning at least three more weeks of its campaign against Iran with 'thousands of targets' remaining. No withdrawal timeline. Progressing to military industries and 'entire production chain.' Prolonged war posture confirmed.

latest_news.headline: Israel and Lebanon expected to hold talks 'in coming days' for durable ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament
latest_news.text: Two Israeli officials confirm Israel-Lebanon talks expected 'in the coming days' aimed at securing durable ceasefire that would see Hezbollah disarmed. First concrete ceasefire signal since war resumed Mar 2.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM: 'We never asked for ceasefire, ready for long war'
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi CBS: 'We have never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation. Ready to defend ourselves as long as it takes.' Trump says Iran wants deal but US 'not ready.' Both sides rejecting diplomacy.

latest_news.headline: Afghan mortar kills 4 family members in Bajaur, Pakistan
latest_news.text: Mortar fired from Afghanistan destroyed a home in Bajaur, northwestern Pakistan, killing 4 members of same family and wounding 2. Afghanistan also claims captured Pakistani military outpost and destroyed South Waziristan camp.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan continues Kandahar overnight strikes — Afghanistan denies casualties
latest_news.text: Pakistan says forces 'effectively' destroyed technical support infrastructure and equipment storage in Kandahar. Also hit tunnel used by TTP. Afghan govt says no casualties, accuses Pakistan of 'fueling fire of war.' 99 total killed since conflict began.

latest_news.headline: Trump demands 'about 7' countries join Hormuz coalition — NATO faces 'very bad future'
latest_news.text: Trump demands ~7 countries join US-led coalition to reopen and police Strait of Hormuz. Warns NATO faces 'very bad future' if allies refuse. IRGC responds: 'Let him send his ships.'

latest_news.headline: Macron calls Iranian President Pezeshkian demands 'immediate end' to Gulf attacks
latest_news.text: French President Macron spoke with Iranian President Pezeshkian, demanded 'immediate end to unacceptable attacks.' Says France intervening 'within strictly defensive framework.' Warns 'uncontrolled escalation' plunging region into chaos.

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 430 drones at Ukraine — massive aerial bombardment continues
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with 68 missiles and ~430 drones Saturday. 6 killed in Kyiv region. Zaporizhzhia residential area hit. Poland scrambled jets. Moldova reports drone intrusion.

outlook: CRITICAL — Global war probability 85% (Day 17 03:00). DAY 17 CONTINUES: (1) IRAN -> IMMINENT 100 (capped, STABLE): IDF plans '3 more weeks' of campaign (CNN). FM rejects ceasefire. Trump rejects deal. Macron demands end to attacks. 1,348 Iran civilian deaths confirmed at UN. No diplomatic track. (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON -> IMMINENT 90 (FALLING): Ceasefire talks on track for 'coming days' — durable ceasefire + Hezbollah disarmament. Score drifts down 92→90. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE -> IMMINENT 93 (RISING): 68 missiles + 430 drones Saturday. UK diverting resources to ME. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN -> IMMINENT 99 (capped, STABLE): Kandahar strikes continue. Afghan mortar kills 4 in Bajaur, Pakistan. 99 total dead. No ceasefire. (5) TURKEY -> IMMINENT 78. (6) RUSSIA -> IMMINENT 77. (7) DPRK -> CRITICAL 55. (8) INDIA -> ELEVATED 25. KEY WATCH: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire talks the only de-escalation channel. If talks succeed, Lebanon front could cool significantly. Meanwhile Iran front hardening with 3+ week war plan, and Pakistan-Afghanistan escalates with cross-border civilian casualties on both sides.
